cause_analysis.narrative: SpaLyfe churned on 2026-04-10 after 181 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-01-14 (sms) — first complaint keyword: "issue". Classification: competitive switch. The client mentioned an alternative provider before cancelling. 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Competitive] Client mentioned a competitor on 2026-02-17 — log this to Product + Sales for competitive positioning work.
[SLA] 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-16 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Accepted: SpaLyfe | Zoca @ Tue Mar 24, 2026 3:30am - 4am (GMT+5:30) (santhosh.v@zoca.com)\n\nBody: 96 SpaLyfe |…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
